title: Ground Support Equipment Manufacturing
entry_mechanism: PSAP Track 3 Supplier Development — Saudi manufacturer with European GSE licensor
executive_summary: Node MA-3 targets Saudi manufacturing of non-ITAR aviation Ground Support Equipment — the most accessible manufacturing entry point in the military aerospace node set. Power carts, hydraulic test units, jacks, and tow bars are manufactured using standard industrial engineering processes that Saudi Arabia already has in its industrial base. This is the ideal Phase I confidence-builder: achievable within 12–18 months, verifiable by GAMI, and creating the first Saudi aerospace supplier genuinely independent of ITAR restrictions or OEM licensing.

companies.name: TLD Group
companies.rationale: World's largest independent GSE manufacturer; licensing track record; 400Hz GPU and tow tractor designs.
companies.contact: TLD VP International Licensing and OEM Partnerships

companies.name: Tronair
companies.rationale: Military GSE specialist with QPL listings; existing RSAF contract familiarity.
companies.contact: Tronair VP Government Sales and International Business

companies.name: Textron GSE
companies.rationale: US military GPU and maintenance equipment supply; existing Saudi Bell helicopter relationship.

companies.contact: Mallaghan CEO / VP Sales, Middle East

companies.name: Absolute Hydraulics
companies.rationale: Aerospace-grade hydraulic test equipment; no ITAR/EAR complications; licensable designs.
